summary: Completed initial testing of U-CAN pet services marketplace. Backend APIs working correctly but frontend has authentication issues preventing full integration testing. Fixed critical ProviderDashboard component bug.

ui_bugs.issue: Component name mismatch - was defined as AdminDashboard but exported as ProviderDashboard
ui_bugs.fix_applied: Fixed component name to match export

integration_issues.issue: Provider profile pages show loading spinner indefinitely due to 401 authentication errors
integration_issues.impact: Contact blocking feature cannot be tested - core requirement

integration_issues.issue: Search page shows '5 Proveedores encontrados' but some API calls return 401 errors
integration_issues.symptoms: Providers are listed but individual profiles fail to load

authentication_issues.issue: Frontend API calls returning 401 unauthorized errors
authentication_issues.impact: Prevents testing of subscription-gated features like contact blocking

passed_tests: Backend subscription plans endpoint returns 3 plans ($10k, $25k, $80k)
Backend authentication endpoint returns 401 for unauthenticated requests
Frontend homepage loads with U-CAN design
Homepage shows main title with 'CUIDADO' text
Search functionality navigates to search page
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication issues causing 401 errors on API calls. This prevents testing of critical features like contact blocking for non-subscribers. The backend APIs work correctly when called directly, but the frontend cannot authenticate properly to access protected/semi-protected endpoints.

success_percentage.frontend: 70% - UI loads correctly but authentication integration failing
